title: Fra kursfald til comeback? Investorer peger på to interes­sante C25-aktier
summary_md:
# Fra kursfald til comeback? Investorer peger på to interes­sante C25-aktier

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-04-29  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

## Summary

Danish podcast analyzing C25 stocks through a ROIC lens (Return on Invested Capital).
Key findings: 16 of 25 C25 companies show declining ROIC; structural capital outflow
from Danish market as Novo Nordisk unwind forces repositioning.

**Flagged as interesting**: Ambu (high growth expectations ~18%/yr, valuation now reasonable
after multi-year fall), Pandora (attractive valuation after silver price pressure, new CEO).
**Top ROIC scorers in 2026 screen**: Trophy Games (game studio, 34% avg annual growth, profitable),
Free Trailer, Hove (wind turbine lubricants), Green Mobility (turnaround complete).

Vestas highlighted by Ole Söberg with 220–250 DKK year-end target (possible 350–400 in 4–5 years).
All Danish C25 stocks; no Swedish universe signals.

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
